description: Unified memory and context engine for OpenClaw — DAG-based summarization, retrieval, and sub-agent expansion

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Enable or disable the LCM context engine (disabling falls back to OpenClaw built-in compaction)

contextThreshold.label: Context Threshold
contextThreshold.help: Fraction of context window that triggers compaction (0.0–1.0). Default: 0.75

freshTailCount.label: Fresh Tail Count
freshTailCount.help: Number of recent messages protected from compaction. Default: 32

incrementalMaxDepth.label: Incremental Max Depth
incrementalMaxDepth.help: How deep incremental compaction goes after each leaf pass (0 = leaf only, -1 = unlimited). Default: 0

leafMinFanout.label: Leaf Min Fanout
leafMinFanout.help: Minimum raw messages outside the fresh tail before a leaf summary pass runs. Default: 8

condensedMinFanout.label: Condensed Min Fanout
condensedMinFanout.help: Minimum same-depth summaries before condensation into a higher-level summary. Default: 4

condensedMinFanoutHard.label: Condensed Min Fanout (Hard)
condensedMinFanoutHard.help: Hard minimum for condensed fanout; overflows condense regardless of soft limit. Default: 2

leafChunkTokens.label: Leaf Chunk Tokens
leafChunkTokens.help: Maximum tokens of source material fed into a single leaf compaction pass. Default: 20000

leafTargetTokens.label: Leaf Target Tokens
leafTargetTokens.help: Target token size for leaf (raw-message) summaries. Default: 1200

condensedTargetTokens.label: Condensed Target Tokens
condensedTargetTokens.help: Target token size for condensed (higher-level) summaries. Default: 2000

maxExpandTokens.label: Max Expand Tokens
maxExpandTokens.help: Maximum tokens to expand from a summary node during sub-agent expansion. Default: 4000

dbPath.label: Database Path
dbPath.help: Path to the LCM SQLite database file. Default: ~/.openclaw/lcm.db

largeFileThresholdTokens.label: Large File Threshold (tokens)
largeFileThresholdTokens.help: Token count above which a file is considered 'large' and summarized before storage. Default: 25000

summaryModel.label: Summary Model
summaryModel.help: Model override for main conversation summarization (e.g., 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001')

summaryProvider.label: Summary Provider
summaryProvider.help: Provider override for main conversation summarization (e.g., 'anthropic')

largeFileSummaryModel.label: Large-File Summary Model
largeFileSummaryModel.help: Model override specifically for large-file text summarization. Falls back to summaryModel if unset.

largeFileSummaryProvider.label: Large-File Summary Provider
largeFileSummaryProvider.help: Provider override specifically for large-file text summarization. Falls back to summaryProvider if unset.

autocompactDisabled.label: Disable Auto-Compaction
autocompactDisabled.help: When true, automatic compaction is disabled; use /compact manually. Default: false

timezone.label: Timezone
timezone.help: IANA timezone for timestamps in summaries (e.g., 'America/Los_Angeles'). Default: system timezone

pruneHeartbeatOk.label: Prune Heartbeat-OK Turns
pruneHeartbeatOk.help: When true, retroactively removes HEARTBEAT_OK turn cycles from LCM storage to reduce noise. Default: false

vaultEnabled.label: Vault Enabled
vaultEnabled.help: Enable Obsidian vault surface generation. Default: false

vaultPath.label: Vault Path
vaultPath.help: Absolute path to the Obsidian vault root directory. Required when vault is enabled.

vaultSubdir.label: Vault Subdirectory
vaultSubdir.help: Sub-directory inside the vault root where generated files are written. Default: 'Engram'

vaultHomeNoteName.label: Home Note Name
vaultHomeNoteName.help: Name for the vault home note (without .md extension). Default: 'Home'

vaultManualFolders.label: Manual Folders
vaultManualFolders.help: Comma-separated list of manually managed folders protected from cleanup. Default: 'Inbox,Manual'

vaultClean.label: Clean Stale Files
vaultClean.help: Remove stale generated files on each vault build. Default: true

vaultReportsEnabled.label: Reports Enabled
vaultReportsEnabled.help: Write report files (manifest, freshness, build summary) on each build. Default: true

obsidianMode.label: Obsidian Mode
obsidianMode.help: Surface mode: 'curated' shows only condensed summaries; 'diagnostic' includes full DAG detail. Default: 'curated'

obsidianExportDiagnostics.label: Export Diagnostics
obsidianExportDiagnostics.help: When true, export diagnostic views (summary depth distribution, raw leaf list). Default: false
